title: Savory Juicy Light Middle Eastern Beef Steak
description: A keto-friendly and sous-vide prepared savory beef steak with a touch of beer for added depth and juiciness, perfect as a light main course.

ingredients.name: Beef Steak
ingredients.notes: Choose a lean cut like sirloin or flank steak for the best result.

ingredients.name: Beer
ingredients.notes: A light beer works well, such as Pilsner or Witbier.

ingredients.name: Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: To sear the steak on a hot skillet.

instructions: Preheat your sous-vide machine to 60°C (140°F). Place the beef steak in a vacuum-sealed bag with a small amount of beer.
Vacuum seal and cook the steak for 5 hours at 60°C (140°F).
Remove from the sous-vide machine, let it rest for about 10 minutes.
Season both sides of the steak generously with salt and pepper. In a hot skillet, add olive oil to sear each side for approximately 2-3 minutes per side until golden brown and cooked through.
Slice the steak against the grain into thin slices and serve warm.
